examples/opengl/opengl_solar_system.nano.description: Added init_glut_for_primitives() helper and glutInit(0,0) call in main() before setup_opengl(). Freeglut requires glutInit before any glutSolid* call even when GLFW manages the window.

examples/opengl/opengl_teapot.nano.description: Added glutInit(0,0) call before setup_opengl(). Freeglut requires glutInit before glutSolidTeapot even when GLFW manages the window.
